name: org-security-context
description: Gives agents organization-specific security and compliance context: approved domains, escalation contacts, data classification and handling rules, and the controlling compliance regime (e.g. HIPAA/PHI, PCI-DSS). Use when an agent handles email, browses the web, processes documents, or touches regulated or sensitive data on behalf of the organization. Customize the placeholders before deploying.
version_note: Template plugin intended to be customized per-organization before rollout.
